title: V8 Sandbox Bypass: In-sandbox corruption allows execution of dangerous / experimental code
bounty_rationale: thank you for pointing out a class of issues here
description_snippet:
### VULNERABILITY DETAILS

#### README

**This bug report is a meta-report on a class of V8 sandbox bypasses**. I will not be filing bugs for every single discovered bypasses of these types as it just adds noise, but if you want to see more of these let me know. As I expect much more of these proble
